category_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/gptscript-ai/gptscript says GPTScript lets LLMs operate and interact with systems.
source_facts.description: "Develop LLM Apps in Natural Language".
display_name_sources: Official docs use GPTScript branding: https://docs.gptscript.ai/.
Official repository README uses the title GPTScript: https://github.com/gptscript-ai/gptscript.
docs_sources: Official repository README links sample use cases to docs.gptscript.ai.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/gptscript-ai/gptscript; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official repository README describes integrating local or remote systems with LLMs using prompts.
